title: erythrobalanus duqueana
intro: Erythrobalanus duqueana, also known as the Duqueana fruit tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Erythrobalanus duqueana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
